quote: The guys at Steel City Visuals are great. They deliver a high quality product and I always enjoy working with them. They've always been patient and professional and work with me on my specific preferences for listing photos. These boys lend a hand on the shoot and do what it takes to get it done. You won't be disappointed with the end product!
name: Melanie Marsh

quote: Steel City Visuals is top-notch. Kyle consistently delivers exceptional luxury property videos that elevate my listings. Every project feels like a true collaboration — he listens to my ideas, offers creative suggestions, and tailors the storyline to highlight each property's unique features. The result is always polished, professional, and custom-crafted. Highly recommend.
name: Liza Christ

quote: We couldn't be happier with our experience with Steel City Visuals! They were our wedding videographer, and from start to finish they were professional, organized, and incredibly talented. Kyle and Conner made us feel comfortable the entire day. The drone footage added such a cinematic touch — they almost lost a drone to capture an amazing fireworks shot, which says a lot about their dedication. Everything turned out better than we could have imagined.
name: Chase Thiel

quote: I've been using Steel City Visuals and working with the entire team for a little over a year now and the attention to detail, willingness to explain their process, and listen to help bring my vision to life is 6/5 stars if I could. Could not recommend more.
name: Dylan Jenkins

quote: We worked with Kyle for our company headshots and we couldn't be happier with the result. Everything was incredibly seamless and easy and we got our edited photos for all of our employees within the week. Great experience all around.
name: Antoni Aivaliotis

quote: I honestly can't say enough good things about Kyle and the entire team. In real estate, presentation matters so much, and this team consistently delivers photos, drone work, editing, and marketing media that make homes feel elevated, warm, and memorable. They don't just 'take pictures' — they understand how to capture the feeling of a home and tell a story. Huge shoutout to Kyle, Nick, Conner, and Kristi. 10 stars!
name: Robert Marusic

quote: I hired Kyle to video my wedding after knowing him from his excellent reputation in Pittsburgh Real Estate. Kyle & team were nothing short of amazing. The videos were top notch, but what really stuck out was the experience. Getting married is stressful enough, but this team was accommodating and kind. Who you work with matters — and this team is top tier. Highly recommend!
name: Christina Batis

quote: Did an amazing job with our engagement pictures! They went out to the scene at midnight the day before to ensure the positioning of the shoot was going to work out given active construction. SCV will treat you as if you are a long time friend. Go support a small business!
name: Michael Ujevich
